title: Publications from competition authorities
description: Dataset containing metadata of decisions and publications issued by competition authorities. Each record represents a single publication (decision, opinion, press release, etc.) from a national or international competition authority. Full text is available in the companion JSON dataset.

fields.name: id
fields.title: Internal identifier
fields.description: Internal unique identifier of the record, as an integer. Assigned by the dataset producer and stable across updates.

fields.name: case_number
fields.title: Case number
fields.description: Official reference number of the decision as assigned by the competition authority (e.g. '22-D-15' for a French Autorité de la concurrence decision). Unique within the dataset.

fields.name: case_title
fields.title: Case title
fields.description: Official title of the decision or publication, as published by the authority. May include the names of the companies or sectors involved.

fields.name: case_date_publication
fields.title: Publication date
fields.description: Date on which the decision was officially published by the authority, in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD). Distinct from the decision date, which may be earlier.

fields.name: case_sectors
fields.title: Sectors
fields.description: Economic sector(s) concerned by the decision. Multiple values are separated by a semicolon (e.g. 'energy;distribution'). A single sector is stored as a plain string.

fields.name: case_companies
fields.title: Companies
fields.description: Company or companies involved as a party in the case. Multiple values are separated by a semicolon. Names should match the official legal entity name where possible.

fields.name: case_source_url
fields.title: Source URL
fields.description: Permanent URL of the page on the authority's website where the decision is published. Should point to the official source, not an aggregator or mirror.
